title: Front Office Manager - Six Senses India Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Six Senses India Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Six Senses India Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Six Senses India Capital India:
Six Senses India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India Capital India!
